title: "Como va el partido": England defeats France in World Cup match
description: Users in Argentina are searching for "como va el partido" following reports that England defeated France 6-4 in a recent World Cup game.

sources.title: Inglaterra le ganó a Francia 6 a 4 en el mejor partido del Mundial y se quedó con el premio consuelo
"Proeza amarga de Mbappé": la reacción de los medios internacionales tras el triunfo de Inglaterra vs Francia
Diez goles, un récord de Mbappé y el tercer puesto del Mundial para una Inglaterra demoledora

sections.heading: Match Outcome
paragraphs: According to La Nación, England beat France 6 to 4 in what the publication describes as the "best match of the World Cup." La Gaceta confirms the high-scoring nature of the game, noting there were ten goals in total.

sections.heading: Tournament Placement
paragraphs: La Nación reports that England took the "consolation prize" following the victory. La Gaceta specifies that this result secured the third place in the World Cup for a "demolishing" England team.

sections.heading: Player and Media Reactions
paragraphs: La Gaceta notes that Mbappé achieved a record during the match. Clarin.com highlights the reaction of international media, referring to Mbappé's performance as a "bitter feat" in the wake of England's triumph over France.

faq.q: What was the final score of the match?
faq.a: According to La Nación, England defeated France with a score of 6 to 4.

faq.q: Which team finished in third place?
faq.a: La Gaceta reports that England secured the third place in the World Cup.

faq.q: How did the media describe the game?
faq.a: La Nación called it the "best match of the World Cup," while Clarin.com discussed the international media's reaction to England's triumph.

news_coverage.title: Inglaterra le ganó a Francia 6 a 4 en el mejor partido del Mundial y se quedó con el premio consuelo
"Proeza amarga de Mbappé": la reacción de los medios internacionales tras el triunfo de Inglaterra vs Francia
Diez goles, un récord de Mbappé y el tercer puesto del Mundial para una Inglaterra demoledora

review.notes: rules: all rules checks passed | reviewer(qwen-max): The article is well-structured and accurately reflects the facts provided. The only minor issue is a slight exaggeration in the use of terms like 'demolishing' and 'best match,' which could be seen as somewhat sensational, but it does not significantly detract from the overall quality.
